overview: Professional business website for SV Engineering, a supplier and sourcing partner for pneumatic and automation components established in 2021. Features a product catalog, lead generation inquiry forms, and a clean industrial design.
features: Homepage with hero, featured products, and Why Choose Us section
Products page with 7 categories and filterable product grid
Product detail pages with specifications and quote request button
About Us, Services, and Contact pages
Inquiry form for lead generation (Name, Phone, Requirement)
Mobile-responsive industrial design in blue, white, and grey
Industries We Serve section (manufacturing, automation, machinery)
